memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< ipfs_pubsub::GossipPubSub > gossipPubSub, std::shared_ptr< ProcessingSubTaskQueueManager > subTaskQueueManager, std::shared_ptr< SubTaskResultStorage > subTaskResultStorage, std::function< void(const SGProcessing::TaskResult &)> taskResultProcessingSink, std::function< void(const std::string &)> processingErrorSink)
memberdef.name: SubTaskQueueAccessorImpl

detaileddescription.para:
Creates subtask queue accessor implementation object.
gossipPubSub
PubSub host used to subscribe to result channel.
subTaskQueueManager
In-memory queue manager.
subTaskResultStorage
Processing results storage.
taskResultProcessingSink
Callback invoked when task processing completes.
processingErrorSink
Callback invoked on processing errors.

Assigns a subtask list to processing queue
subTasks
- a list of enqueued subtasks

Asynchronous getting of a subtask from the queue
onSubTaskGrabbedCallback
a callback that is called when a subtask is grabbed by the local node

Finalizes subtask execution
subTaskId
- id of processed subtask
subTaskResult
- result of subtask processing

Returns available results of subtask queue
a vector of subtask id->results pairs

memberdef.argsstring: (std::weak_ptr< SubTaskQueueAccessorImpl > weakThis, boost::optional< const ipfs_pubsub::GossipPubSub::Message & > message)
memberdef.name: OnResultChannelMessage
